nsg_api_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from configured API endpoint source CIDR 10.0.1.0/24 on port 6443. In published Hub E profiles this is the hub management subnet used for private administrative access.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress for Kubernetes control plane inter-communication on source port 6443

nsg_pods.description: Allow TCP ingress from pods to OKE control plane for responses to Kubernetes API server callbacks to pod-hosted admission webhooks. Keep the explicit 12250 and 6443 rules below as the fixed OKE control plane paths if this broader webhook rule is removed.

nsg_pods_12250.description: Allow TCP ingress from pods to kube-apiserver on port 12250

nsg_pods_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from pods on port 6443

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP ingress from OCI services to control plane for responses

nsg_workers_10250.description: Allow TCP ingress to control plane from worker nodes for Kubelet responses on source port 10250

nsg_workers_12250.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from workers on port 12250

nsg_workers_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from workers on port 6443

nsg_api_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from kube-apiserver to configured API endpoint source CIDR 10.0.1.0/24 on source port 6443. In published Hub E profiles this is the hub management subnet used for private administrative access.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP egress for Kubernetes control plane inter-communication

nsg_pods.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods on any port for Kubernetes API server callbacks to pod-hosted admission webhooks. Keep the explicit 12250 and 6443 rules below as the fixed OKE control plane paths if this broader webhook rule is removed.

nsg_pods_12250.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods with source port 12250

nsg_pods_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods with source port 6443

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to OCI services

nsg_workers_10250.description: Allow TCP egress for path discovery to worker nodes

nsg_workers_12250.description: Allow TCP egress from control plane to worker nodes with source port 12250

nsg_workers_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from control plane to worker nodes with source port 6443

nsg_pods_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress from pods to load balancers for responses

nsg_pods_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress from pods to load balancers for responses

nsg_workers_10256.description: Allow TCP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for health check responses on source port 10256

nsg_workers_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for service responses on source ports 30000-32767

nsg_workers_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for service responses on source ports 30000-32767

nsg_pods_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from load balancers to pods for OCI Native Ingress and Pods as Backends

nsg_pods_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from load balancers to pods for OCI Native Ingress and Pods as Backends

nsg_workers_10256.description: Allow TCP egress from load balancers to worker nodes for health checks

nsg_workers_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from load balancers to worker nodes for NodePort traffic

nsg_workers_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from load balancers to worker nodes for NodePort traffic

hub_public_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to pods from Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24. OKE services can request public load balancers in that Hub subnet through annotations; because the subnet is in another VCN, this rule uses a CIDR source instead of an NSG source.

hub_public_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to pods from Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24. OKE services can request public load balancers in that Hub subnet through annotations; because the subnet is in another VCN, this rule uses a CIDR source instead of an NSG source.

nsg_cp.description: Allow ALL ingress to pods from Kubernetes control plane for pod-hosted admission webhooks. This broad rule is required when webhook services use arbitrary target ports, but it can be removed if the deployment forbids pod-hosted webhooks or accepts managing narrower webhook ports explicitly.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress from control plane to pods on source port 6443

nsg_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to pods from load balancers

nsg_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to pods from load balancers

nsg_pods.description: Allow ALL ingress to pods from other pods

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP ingress from OCI services to pods

nsg_workers.description: Allow ALL ingress to pods from workers

anywhere.description: Allow ALL egress from pods to internet

hub_public_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from pods to Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 for responses to public load balancer traffic. This is the stateless return pair for the Hub public LB TCP ingress rule.

hub_public_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from pods to Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 for responses to public load balancer traffic. This is the stateless return pair for the Hub public LB UDP ingress rule.

nsg_cp.description: Allow ALL egress from pods to Kubernetes control plane for responses to pod-hosted admission webhook callbacks. This broad rule pairs with the broad webhook ingress rule and can be removed when that rule is removed.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from pods to Kubernetes API server

nsg_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from pods to load balancers

nsg_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from pods to load balancers

nsg_pods.description: Allow ALL egress from pods to other pods

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP egress from pods to OCI Services

nsg_workers.description: Allow ALL egress from pods to workers

hub_public_lb_10256.description: Allow TCP ingress to workers from Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 for health checks on port 10256. OKE services can request public load balancers in that Hub subnet through annotations; because the subnet is in another VCN, this rule uses a CIDR source instead of an NSG source.

hub_public_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to workers from Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 on NodePort service ports 30000-32767. This mirrors the internal load balancer NSG rule using the Hub LB subnet CIDR because the load balancer subnet is in another VCN.

hub_public_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to workers from Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 on NodePort service ports 30000-32767. This mirrors the internal load balancer NSG rule using the Hub LB subnet CIDR because the load balancer subnet is in another VCN.

nsg_cp.description: Allow TCP ingress to workers from Kubernetes control plane for API server callbacks to webhooks served on worker hostNetwork ports. This rule is broad on TCP ports because hostNetwork webhooks can listen on non-standard ports.

nsg_cp_10250.description: Allow TCP ingress from control plane to workers on source port 10250

nsg_cp_12250.description: Allow TCP ingress from control plane to workers on source port 12250

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress from control plane to workers on source port 6443

nsg_lb_10256.description: Allow TCP ingress to workers for health check from load balancer on port 10256

nsg_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to workers from load balancers on service ports 30000-32767

nsg_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to workers from load balancers on service ports 30000-32767

nsg_pods.description: Allow ALL ingress to workers from pods

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP ingress from OCI services to workers

nsg_workers.description: Allow ALL ingress to workers from other workers

anywhere.description: Allow ALL egress from workers to internet

hub_public_lb_10256.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 with source port 10256 for health check responses. This is the stateless return pair for the Hub public LB health check ingress rule.

hub_public_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 with source ports 30000-32767 for NodePort service responses. This is the stateless return pair for the Hub public LB TCP NodePort ingress rule.

hub_public_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from workers to Hub public load balancer subnet 10.0.0.0/24 with source ports 30000-32767 for NodePort service responses. This is the stateless return pair for the Hub public LB UDP NodePort ingress rule.

nsg_cp.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to Kubernetes control plane for responses to API server callbacks to webhooks served on worker hostNetwork ports. This rule is broad on TCP ports because hostNetwork webhooks can listen on non-standard ports.

nsg_cp_10250.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to OKE control plane

nsg_cp_12250.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to OKE control plane on port 12250

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to Kubernetes API server

nsg_lb_10256.description: Allow TCP egress to load balancers from workers with source port 10256

nsg_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress to load balancers from workers with source ports 30000-32767

nsg_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP egress to load balancers from workers with source ports 30000-32767

nsg_pods.description: Allow ALL egress from workers to pods

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP egress from workers to OCI Services

nsg_workers.description: Allow ALL egress from workers to other workers
